properties.title: Commercial Property
properties.summary: A commercial asset to evaluate through operating use, tenant quality, cash flow, and long-term value.

properties.title: Residential Property
properties.summary: A residential opportunity to review through market fit, buyer demand, financing structure, and durability.

properties.title: Seller-Financed Opportunity
properties.summary: A property or deal structure where flexible terms may help the buyer and seller reach a practical outcome.

properties.title: Family Property Package
properties.summary: A grouped view for multiple family properties that may be sold individually or reviewed as a package.

properties.title: Investment Property
properties.summary: A real-estate investment opportunity to assess through downside protection, cash flow, and exit optionality.

properties.title: Development or Land Opportunity
properties.summary: A land or development-style opportunity where zoning, access, utilities, and timing drive the decision.
